title: CME lists Solana futures
description: CME Group launches SOL and Micro SOL futures, its first new crypto asset since Ether.

title: CME lists XRP futures
description: CME Group adds XRP and Micro XRP futures to its crypto suite.

title: Coinbase self-certifies US perpetual-style futures
description: Coinbase Derivatives files CFTC self-certifications for nano BTC and ETH perpetual-style futures — 5-year contracts with a funding-rate mechanism, the first US answer to offshore perps.

title: Coinbase Derivatives perp-style futures go live
description: Nano BTC and ETH perpetual-style futures begin trading 24/7 on the CFTC-regulated Coinbase Derivatives Exchange.

title: CME lists options on SOL and XRP futures
description: Options on SOL, Micro SOL, XRP and Micro XRP futures begin trading.

title: CME lists spot-quoted XRP and SOL futures
description: CME expands crypto derivatives with spot-quoted contracts aimed at retail-sized participants.

title: CME announces 24/7 crypto trading
description: CME Group sets May 29 launch for around-the-clock cryptocurrency futures and options trading, pending regulatory review.

title: CFTC approves Kalshi BTCPERP
description: The CFTC issues an Order of Approval for KalshiEX's BTCPERP — the first true perpetual contract approved on a US-regulated exchange (press release 9240-26).

title: CME 24/7 crypto trading goes live
description: CME cryptocurrency futures and options begin trading around the clock, matching offshore market hours for the first time.

title: Kraken launches US perpetual futures
description: Kraken brings CFTC-regulated perpetual futures to US traders on Kraken Pro, listed on Bitnomial — the triple-licensed DCM/DCO/FCM its parent acquired for $550M in April 2026.

title: Kalshi BTCPERP begins trading
description: Kalshi's bitcoin perpetual goes live with zero launch-period fees; notional volume tops $1B in the first week and $5.5B within two.
